summary: Excellent soundboard recording featuring a stellar first‑set Friend of the Devil and a smoking Help → Slip → Franklin’s Tower in the second set.
review: Both reviewers rave about this 1976 Tower run tape, calling the performance awesome and noting the superb mastering work. The setlist shines with a nicely rendered Friend of the Devil on Set 1 and an especially smoking Help‑on‑the‑Way / Slipknot! / Franklin’s Tower sequence on Set 2, captured in clear, high‑quality soundboard audio.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed 5‑star reviews highlight an outstanding performance and a pristine soundboard recording, giving strong confidence in a top rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, well‑mastered SBD capture with no reported dropouts or muddiness; reviewers praise the fine work done on the tape.

standout_songs: Help on the Way > Slipknot! > Franklin's Tower
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set opens strong with a nice Friend of the Devil; second set fires up with a smoking Help‑on‑the‑Way/Slipknot!/Franklin’s Tower sequence, making the whole show worth listening to.
